# SL-HTTP-010: response-time-over-policy

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

HTTP response timing exceeds the configured technical policy.

## Metadata

- Category: HTTP and rendering (http-rendering)
- Default severity: info
- Confidence: heuristic
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- http-header

## Required Evidence

- response-timing
- policy-threshold

## When This Triggers

Compare measured response timing with route or site timing policy.

## False Positives

This rule is heuristic. Treat the diagnostic as a review prompt and use DSL
severity overrides or suppressions when project policy intentionally differs.

## How To Fix

Investigate slow server response, cache behavior, or route rendering path.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/http/response-time-over-policy

Fixed direction:

- Investigate slow server response, cache behavior, or route rendering path.
